316.reason: [This increments i again after already incrementing it at the start of the character literal processing, causing it to skip the next character and potentially misalign the parsing position]

326.reason: [This backtracking by 2 positions is incorrect because the total forward movement was 2 (first i++ at start, then another i++ above), but if we're at end of file or malformed char literal, this could cause negative indexing or wrong position]
